tours.title: First-Boot Walkthrough
tours.description: Full narrated walkthrough of the first-run wizard: CAN bus scan, ECU picker, and WiFi setup.

tours.title: 60-Second Quick Walkthrough
tours.description: Condensed tour hitting all three wizard steps in under a minute. Ideal for marketing / landing pages.

tours.title: Reading the Dashboard
tours.description: Widget-by-widget overview of the default layout — RPM bar, speed, panels, bars, warnings, indicators. Teaches new users what they're looking at.

tours.title: Menu & Device Settings
tours.description: Short tap reveals the Menu button, walks through the Setup Menu, then every section of Device Settings — CAN bus, Network, Display, Logging, Peak Hold, Testing, CAN diagnostics, and the footer actions.

tours.title: Display: Brightness & Night Mode
tours.description: Deep-dive on the Display card — brightness slider, dimmer-switch binding, night mode, and rotation. Live controls work in the sandbox.

tours.title: Data Logging & Peak Hold
tours.description: SD card session recording, sample rate selection, and the all-time peak/min table. Two tools for post-session analysis.

tours.title: Editing a Widget
tours.description: Tap any widget to open the config modal. Covers the Data / Presets / Alerts tabs, signal binding, CAN bus settings, and the save-or-cancel footer.
